description: Create a Talon voice module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\alpr_query\ that enables querying an Automated License Plate Reader database hands-free. The module must implement a phonetic alphabet list named `user.police_phonetic` in `phonetic.talon-list` mapping APCO terms (adam: A, boy: B, etc.) and digits to their respective characters. In `alpr_query.py`, define a capture named `police_plate` that concatenates these phonetic matches into a continuous string and an action `lookup_towed_vehicle(plate: str)` that queries the `towed` table in the SQLite database at `C:\Users\Docker\talon_data\towed_vehicles.db`. The action should use `actions.insert()` to output "VEHICLE FOUND: [Color] [Make] at [Towed_to_Address]" or "VEHICLE NOT FOUND IN TOW DATABASE" based on the query results. Finally, define the voice command `tow search <user.police_plate>:` in `alpr_query.talon` to trigger the lookup action with the captured plate.
